programmes.show_description: Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and future classics of the twenty twenties!
We've raided the Clubland vaults and decided to mix things up a bit! Enjoy some of the most awesome classics there are, mixed and mashed up to perfection.
Nice One, Top One, Get Sorted with 30 tracks that defined an era. Join Utah Saints and experience the early 90s rave scene with the tracks that mattered. Where's the noisy people!
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!
It came and went in the blink of an eye. With its uptempo beats, digital drops and infectious rhythms, from Avicii to Zedd, do you remember EDM?
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and classic tracks of the noughties!
Relive the decade of big-room bangers and the hottest Club belters from 2010 to 2019. Get ready to burn up the carpet and dance yourself silly!
Definitive floorfillers from the first five years of this century! From speed garage to David Guetta's debut, and a bunch of all-time Clubland Classics!
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and classic tracks of the noughties!
25 dance hits of the 2010s you've probably forgotten - but no longer! Expect Black Eyed Peas, Swedish House Mafia, Roll Deep and Martin Garrix.
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Bruno Brookes with the biggest selling dance and beat-driven pop songs of the decade - ranked by sales! The number 1 sold 1.7 million - can you guess what it is?
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Kiss FM favourite Bam Bam is back once again, firing up 25 of the greatest dance covers ever to grace a dance floor! Featuring Eric Prydz, DJ Sammy and Jonas Blue!

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
Steph gives us her low down on every thing Eurodance. She's hand-picked 40 absolute bangers so expect: Haddaway, Jam & Spoon, Gala, Livin' Joy and a whole continent more!
Melodic synths, pumping beats and shout out loud lyrics. Live your best life with some Eurodance NRG!
Join Stephanie Hirst as she spins some awesome belters! From 2010 to 2019! Here's the lowdown on her fav 3 tracks of each year.
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!

programmes.show_name: Party Rock is in the House!
programmes.show_description: Bangin' party tunes for the ultimate dance karaoke session, if that's your thing. Clubland does it best!
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and classic tracks of the noughties!
Stephanie Hirst gives us her low down on everything Trance. She's hand-picked 30 absolute belters so expect: Paul Van Dyk, Binary Finary, Chicane, Delerium and loads more!
